tasks.subject: Task 2: GenerationError + DiffusersBackend.result() status=error short-circuit

tasks.subject: Task 3: NOOP — wait_for_ready 404 audit

tasks.subject: Task 6: wan_t2v_server.py /artifacts endpoint

tasks.subject: Task 7: Wan 2.2 native cfg + lockdown test
tasks.description: Goal: examples/configs/runpod-diffusers-wan-t2v-14b-2_2.yaml + 2 lockdown tests (server_cmd pin, cap-key differs from 5B).

tasks.subject: Task 7.5: Replace requires_local_weights boolean with refs_to_stage engine method (plan amendment 2026-06-19)
tasks.description: Goal: Foundational fix for the local-download waste discovered during the first Task 8 live-smoke attempt (commit 020be40 era). Replaces the coarse per-engine `requires_local_weights: bool` knob with a method-based per-artifact filter so engines that self-fetch on the pod (Diffusers via from_pretrained, ComfyUI via _kinoforge_download) skip the workspace-side download_all() that was wasting ~$0.50-0.85/leg of pod-idle time. Steps: (1) RED test: engine.refs_to_stage([]) blocks downloader even when legacy requires_local_weights=True. (2) GREEN: provisioner.py consults getattr(engine, 'refs_to_stage', None) first; falls back to legacy boolean. (3) RED test: subset filtering works. (4) GREEN: same provisioner change covers. (5) RED+GREEN: DiffusersEngine overrides refs_to_stage to return []. Files: src/kinoforge/core/interfaces.py (ABC method), src/kinoforge/core/provisioner.py (call site), src/kinoforge/engines/diffusers/__init__.py (override), tests/core/test_provisioner.py (new tests).

tasks.subject: Task 8: Live smoke — cold + warm + cross-cap-key (USER GATE) — scaffold landed; first attempt 2026-06-19 aborted on download-waste finding; awaits Task 7.5 fix
tasks.description: Goal: tests/live/test_diffusers_wan_t2v_live.py runs 3 subprocess generate calls: 14B cold (realistic), 14B warm (dreamlike), 5B cold (cross-cap-key). Final destroy both pods. USER-ORDERED GATE — user authorized re-fire after Task 7.5 lands.

tasks.subject: Task 9: Post-smoke docs + Kijai 14B DEAD marker
tasks.description: Goal: New successful-generations.md entry; PROGRESS.md resume pointer update; mark runpod-comfyui-wan-t2v-14b-2_2.yaml DEAD with sibling pointer.
